since_last: 51% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.87%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 51% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.22% · BTC +0.46% · Gold +0.45% · Nasdaq100 -1.54%. 51% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.87%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.87%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.32%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MGNI is the standout at +6.85%
cards.body: Leaders: MGNI +6.85%, TTD +5.92%, PUBM +5.41%, PINS +4.09%, AI +3.74%. Laggards: TLN -6.11%, INOD -4.43%, LSCC -4.35%, BIDU -4.33%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.55% at $156.67
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.55% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
